entities.name: SOIL VALUES PROGRAMME
entities.description: A programme aimed at strengthening soil fertility, soil health, and climate resilience through evidence-based tools and capacity development

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, the implementing organization of the Soil Values Programme

entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: The capacity of soil to provide essential nutrients to support plant growth

entities.name: SOIL HEALTH
entities.description: The continued capacity of soil to function as a vital living ecosystem

entities.name: CLIMATE RESILIENCE
entities.description: The ability of agricultural systems to withstand and recover from climate-related shocks

entities.name: CAPACITY DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of strengthening the skills and technical knowledge of extension workers and trainers

entities.name: EXTENSION WORKERS
entities.description: Professionals responsible for providing technical agricultural support and training to farmers

entities.name: COMMUNITY TRAINERS
entities.description: Local individuals trained to disseminate agricultural knowledge within their communities

entities.name: MALI
entities.description: The country where the Soil Values Programme activities were implemented

entities.name: UPPER BANI
entities.description: A priority watershed located in Sikasso, Mali

entities.name: UPPER NIGER BASIN
entities.description: A priority watershed located in Ségou, Mali

entities.name: MIDDLE BANI
entities.description: A priority watershed located in San–Tominian, Mali

entities.name: IMPROVED CROP VARIETIES
entities.description: Crop varieties developed for enhanced productivity or resilience

entities.name: FORAGE SPECIES
entities.description: Plants used specifically for livestock feed

entities.name: WOODY SPECIES
entities.description: Perennial plants with woody stems adapted to local conditions

entities.name: AGROECOLOGICAL CONDITIONS
entities.description: The environmental and ecological factors specific to a local agricultural area

entities.name: CLIMATE INFORMATION SERVICES
entities.description: Services that provide climate data to help farmers make informed agricultural decisions

entities.name: CLIMATE-SMART AGRICULTURE
entities.description: An integrated approach to managing landscapes to address food security and climate change

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE LAND MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The use of land resources to meet human needs while ensuring the long-term sustainability of the ecosystem

entities.name: SOIL AND WATER CONSERVATION
entities.description: Practices designed to prevent soil erosion and optimize water usage

entities.name: SOIL DEFENSE AND RESTORATION
entities.description: Practices aimed at protecting soil from degradation and restoring its health

entities.name: FARMER-TRAINERS
entities.description: Farmers who have been trained to provide peer-to-peer training to other farmers

entities.name: DEMONSTRATION PLOTS
entities.description: Small-scale field plots used to showcase the effectiveness of new agricultural techniques

entities.name: CLIMATE INFORMATION DISSEMINATION NETWORK
entities.description: A localized system for spreading climate data to agricultural stakeholders
